skill_availability_goal: Verify an existing aggregate deployment page migrates atomically to the three-class tree with links, navigation, change-map, and duplicate facts reconciled.
prompt: 按 `migration-handoff.md` 已确认的迁移范围，把现有 `docs/site/ops/deployment.md` 拆为三分类结构。fixture 提供聚合页、引用它的站内链接、旧 change-map 和三类证据；路径迁移、链接修复、映射、导航与重复内容归并均已获维护者确认。请执行迁移并运行 `npm run test:docs`。
